# Director Heartbeat Report

**Director:** [Research / Engineering / Risk]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Period covered:** YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD
**Paperclip issue:** [QUA-XXX](../QUA/issues/QUA-XXX)

---

## 1. Pipeline Health Delta

What entered and exited your stage this period.

| Item | Direction | Status | Notes |
|------|-----------|--------|-------|
| [Strategy / task name] | In / Out | [status] | [brief note] |

**Stage inventory (end of period):**
- In queue: N
- In progress: N
- Completed this period: N
- Blocked: N

---

## 2. Blockers

What is stuck and why. Each blocker must name a specific owner and an explicit ask.

| Blocker | Root cause | Owner | Ask | Since |
|---------|-----------|-------|-----|-------|
| [description] | [cause] | [agent/person] | [specific action needed] | YYYY-MM-DD |

*If no blockers: "None."*

---

## 3. Quality Flags

Any signals that Gate 1 integrity, capital preservation, or backtest validity is at risk.

- [ ] Gate 1 criteria under pressure (document specifics below)
- [ ] Capital preservation rule potentially violated (document specifics below)
- [ ] Backtest validity concern (look-ahead, data snooping, regime mismatch)
- [ ] Overfitting risk elevated

**Details:** [required if any box is checked]

*If no flags: "None."*

---

## 4. Decision Log

What was decided this period, the evidence that drove it, and what would reverse the decision.

| Decision | Evidence | Reversal condition |
|----------|----------|-------------------|
| [description] | [data/analysis used] | [what would change this decision] |

*If no decisions: "None."*

---

## 5. Next 3–5 Actions

Each action must be mapped to a Paperclip ticket.

| # | Action | Ticket | Target date |
|---|--------|--------|-------------|
| 1 | [action] | [QUA-XXX] | YYYY-MM-DD |
| 2 | [action] | [QUA-XXX] | YYYY-MM-DD |
| 3 | [action] | [QUA-XXX] | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

## 6. Escalations to CEO

Items requiring CEO decision or awareness. Be explicit about what you need.

- [ ] Decision required: [description]
- [ ] FYI only: [description]

*If no escalations: "None."*

*Template version: 2026-03-15. Update after first pilot cycle if structure proves insufficient.*
